category_sources: Official LibBi homepage says LibBi is used for state-space modelling and Bayesian inference on high-performance hardware.
source_facts.description says Bayesian state-space modelling on parallel computer hardware.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the display name LibBi.
docs_sources: Official LibBi documentation page links the introductory paper and manual.
Official getting-started page points users to the manual and installation guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/lawmurray/LibBi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official LibBi homepage mentions SMC, PMCMC, GPUs, CPUs, and clusters.
source_facts.description identifies Bayesian state-space modelling on parallel hardware.
